BESTIARY.Title: Bestiary

Keybinding.OpenHint: Opens or closes the Bestiary window. Each user can rebind this key independently.

Settings.GmOnlyDetailToggleHint: When enabled, only the GM can switch display modes on creature cards. Players see the mode chosen by the GM.
Settings.OpenBestiaryHint: Click the button above to open the Bestiary window. You can also use the keyboard shortcut (Shift+B by default) or the button in the Journal sidebar.

BESTIARY.ConfirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this section and all its creatures?
BESTIARY.ConfirmRemoveCreature: Remove this creature from the bestiary?
BESTIARY.DropHint: Drag & drop NPC actors here to add them
BESTIARY.NoCreatures: No creatures in this section yet.
BESTIARY.NoSections: No sections yet. Click + to create one.
